identity.title: What is Buk1t?
identity.headline: A personal internet system
identity.body: Buk1t is a collection of small, cool pages. It started as a fun little hobby but some of the pages that I've built (at least to me) are genuinly useful. While part of my so called design principles are futureism and minimalism I hope what you can tell is I try to make it lack clunkiness.

philosophy.title: Design rule
philosophy.body: Less is more. Every page should be simple, focused, and intentional. If something feels heavy, it probably is.

featured.title: Search
featured.desc: Fast routing across buk1t. Ships independently as a real app.

featured.title: Soundscapes
featured.desc: Ambient background for studying — currently in Labs.

now.title: Reorganizing buk1t
now.desc: Reducing subdomains, simplifying styles, and making api the single source of truth.

future.title: iPhone custom start page
future.desc: A clean, touch-first start page built for mobile.

future.title: Family tree maker
future.desc: A simple tool for building and exporting family trees.
